name: Sarah Mitchell
bio: Roommates freshman year. She moved to Vancouver after grad school but we try to video call regularly.

name: James Okafor
bio: My manager at my first job. He taught me everything about backend development. Still grab coffee monthly.

name: Priya Nair
bio: Grew up next door to each other. She's now a pediatrician in Dhaka. We went to the same school for 10 years.

name: Carlos Rivera
bio: Met at a powerlifting competition two years ago. We train together on weekends when schedules align.

name: Anika Hossain
bio: We pulled countless all-nighters together during finals. She's doing her PhD in neuroscience now.

name: Tom Bergmann
bio: Met backpacking through Southeast Asia in 2022. We've kept in touch but life gets busy. Need to reconnect.

name: Fatima Al-Rashid
bio: Colleagues turned best friends. We left the same company the same week and have been cheering each other on since.

name: Liam Nguyen
bio: Our families have been friends for decades. He's like a cousin to me. We catch up every few weeks over games.
